title: Lay's drastically rebrands after disturbing finding: 42% of consumers didn't know their chips were made out of potatoes
reason: This article clearly relates to chips, snacks, and food enthusiasts as it discusses a significant change in Lay's branding due to consumer unawareness about the product being made of potatoes. It is also newsworthy and unique since it highlights an unexpected finding that could impact consumer perception.

title: Tostitos Drops Brand-New Chip Flavor Inspired by a Beloved Mexican Snack
reason: The news article directly mentions a new chip flavor from Tostitos inspired by a Mexican snack, making it highly relevant and interesting for chip/snack food enthusiasts. The uniqueness of the origin adds to its newsworthiness.

title: Lay's Is Introducing 2 New Bold Flavors In 2026
